dailyOutages.plant: Sreepur-Rajendrapur 132kV Ckt-1
dailyOutages.reason: for the first time at 15:05 hrs. Now, Rajendrapur 132/33kV T-2 and T-3 transformer are taking load from Sreepur 230/132/33kV grid S/S through Sreepur-Rajendrapur 132kV Ckt-1 and Rajendrapur 132/33kV T-1 transformer is taking load from Kodda 132/33kV grid S/S through Rajendrapur-Kodda 132kV Ckt-1.
dailyOutages.full_desc: Sreepur-Rajendrapur 132kV Ckt-1 was switched on at 14:46 hrs and put on loaded condition for the first time at 15:05 hrs. Now, Rajendrapur 132/33kV T-2 and T-3 transformer are taking load from Sreepur 230/132/33kV grid S/S through Sreepur-Rajendrapur 132kV Ckt-1 and Rajendrapur 132/33kV T-1 transformer is taking load from Kodda 132/33kV grid S/S through Rajendrapur-Kodda 132kV Ckt-1.
